Why isn't Copilot free?
People love Copilot Money
Marques Brownlee
@mkbhd
What's on my Phone 2026!
Anusan Siva
A must have personal finance app
I wanted an app to track my spending, investments and overall net worth. I’ve been using it for over 2 years now and it’s life changing. The graphs and analysis are beautiful. I’m able to see exactly where all my spend is going and plan for my future. I’d recommend this app to anyone.
John D Saunders
@johndsaunders
Been using @mint for close to a decade and switched to @copilotmoney last week and DAMN.

This IS the move.
Filmstudio11
Totally worth the subscription!
This app is amazing. I never thought I would be spending money on a budgeting app but this one is worth it! This is a 5/5 app no questions asked! I recommend this to everyone who cares about seeing the big picture with their personal finances.
Sunpreet
@sooonpreet
@copilotmoney is awesome, clean design and easy to use
Tpeterson44
I've tried them all
The YNAB’s, the Simplifi’s, the Monarch’s. You name it, I’ve used it. So far, for me, Copilot is the everyday finance tool. I love the user interface, the functionality is superb, it connects to my accounts flawlessly and the support has been outstanding. It’s not perfect, but not a single product out there is. You’ll find some things you don’t like, but overall, this one is a keeper.
TylerByte
@tylerbytes
@copilotmoney is the best money app I’ve ever used!!
David Thaten
The Best Budgeting App!!
Copilot has been a magical experience so far. They’ve innovated the experience of budgeting - it helps keep you informed, but the right things are automatic and effortless. You can choose how manual you’d like it to be - or how much you’d like the app to do the work for you. They’ve solved most of the gaps from mint - and it’s easy to get a budget set up. PFM has been over complicated for too long but Copilot has done a great job of making it easy.
Luca Defreitas-Hansen
@lucadefreitash
Downloaded @copilotmoney yesterday and already love it. Have multiple cards connected and it breaks everything down and so easy to use
Raven Hernandez
@RavenSHernandez
I use @copilotmoney and actually enjoy it. I’ve gotten a few friends hooked too.
Majd Taby
@jtaby
Shoutout to @copilotmoney for being so so good. Finally got an app with a dashboard showing me all my accounts in one place.
legochris100
Amazing Design, Great App to Switch To
I’ve used Mint and Quicken in the past, been somewhat of a power user with Quicken. I love how friendly the iPhone and Mac apps are to use, and how much effort has been spent to get the UX to feel native and clean. They’re also really quick to roll out new features, which has been awesome to see the app getting constantly better. If you’re looking for a way to track your spending and budgeting, definitely give this app a try!
Ehsan Mafi
@essonjon
I use @copilotmoney and I love it!
sietedos
So good and waaay better than mint!
I was on mint for years, but I’m so happy I switched. Managing my finances is now fun thanks to Copilot. Amazing app and incredible support team that actually listen to their customers!
Enelay
@enelayy
Early @copilotmoney user, few apps have become homescreen fixtures so quickly. Go get it!
Gain peace of mind
Welcome to Copilot Money,
the money app that just works.
Get started
Your Privacy Choices

Gain peace of mind
Copilot’s smart monitoring lets you know when something needs your attention with alerts that help you:
Build better credit over time
Prevent overdraft fees
Stick to your budgets
Spot unwanted bank fees
Understand your spending
Stop fraud in its tracks
Know the moment you get paid
Catch changes to your bills
We're on a mission to help you reclaim your data from the banks
We believe providing access to better financial tools improves people’s lives, so we’re taking money matters into our own hands.
Staying on top of finances takes way too much time and energy. We built Copilot because we got tired of waiting around for someone else to do what we always knew was possible.
Building something like Copilot isn’t easy, but we’re lucky to have an all-star team leading the way. Our team members are diverse, working from different parts of the world and coming together to create a better personal finance experience for everyone. We care about getting it right, and about doing right by our users. Get in touch with us with any questions or feedback—we’d love to hear from you.

changelog.title: Copilot Money
changelog.text:
Copilot Money
Features
Pricing
Reviews
Log in
Get started
Dispatch
Discover the latest updates and changes in our product.
Updates
In progress
May 15, 2026
MCP
Beta
We believe your financial data should work where you do, so we’re building an MCP. Now available in beta, it connects Copilot Money securely and directly to top AI tools. Get answers about your spending, budgets, and accounts without switching apps or copying numbers around.
This is the first step toward something bigger: your financial data, available for the tools and workflows you already use. Read-only to start, and tested for Claude, ChatGPT, and Codex CLI. Sign up for the beta waitlist
here
.
Apr 16, 2026
Your Money Assistant
Beta
Managing money well is a constant job, and life doesn't stop to let you do it. Meet: your personal money assistant — a proactive sidekick that keeps an eye on your finances, connects the dots, and surfaces what matters — before you have to go looking for it. It goes beyond chat, something closer to having a financially sharp friend who never stops paying attention.
We've been thoughtful about how this fits into the app you know and love, designed to feel like it’s a natural extension of the Copilot Money experience. It’s working for you, from speaking in the tone you prefer to checking for approval before any edits. Nothing happens without your say-so.
Learn more
.
If you want to be among the first to try it and help shape where it goes,
sign up for the beta waitlist
.
Apr 9, 2026
Web: crypto & workflow improvements
Enhancement
This month, the Web team has been expanding platform support, improving load times, and polishing everyday interactions. Here are the highlights!
Accounts
Crypto Exchange Support:
You can now link supported crypto exchanges directly from the web app, bringing your full financial picture into one place.
Learn more about our crypto support here.
Faster Account Loading:
The Accounts tab now loads significantly faster, even when you have a large number of accounts connected.
Zillow Account Names:
We updated how Zillow account names appear on Web, so they're now consistent across all your devices.
Transactions & Editing
Bulk Edit Stability:
Fixed an issue where some bulk-selected transactions would become deselected after making an edit — your selections now stay intact throughout the process.
Navigation & Layout
Side Panel Refresh:
The side panel is now wider and opens without pre-selecting content on a tab, so you always start with a clean slate.
Mar 18, 2026
Two-Factor Authentication
Feature
You can now add an extra layer of security to your account and device access by enabling two-factor authentication. Once enabled, 2FA applies to your logins and sensitive account management actions, including account deletion and global session revocation.
Configuration: You can set up 2FA directly from your Settings menu.
Supported Methods: Copilot Money currently supports 2FA via authenticator app.
Learn more about authenticator apps here
.
Global Sign-out: A new option in your Settings section allows you to log out of active sessions on all your devices with one click.
2FA is available on iOS, Web, and Mac.
Mar 4, 2026
Web: speed & workflow improvements
Enhancement
Over the past month, the Web team has been refining workflows, increasing application speed, and improving reliability for the new desktop experience. Here’s a few noticeable highlights!
Accounts
Manual Account Sync:
Managing manual accounts is now smoother. When you update a manual account balance or add transactions, your total assets and net worth will refresh right away — no need to reload the page.
Connection Management:
You can now access “Manage Connection” directly from the account detail dropdown, making it easier to fix any issues with linked institutions.
Transactions & Bulk Editing
Tag Consistency:
The bulk-edit tags interface now stays in sync with your changes when editing multiple transactions at once.
Bulk Action Visibility:
We’ve fixed an issue where category, type, and tag options would disappear when using “Select All.”
Stable Sorting:
Changing a category on a “To Review” transaction no longer causes your list to reorder unexpectedly.
Account Management
Authentication States:
Error messages during login and sign-up are now clearer, so you’ll have a better sense of what went wrong.
Login Emails:
We’ve updated our account emails to be cleaner and easier to read.
Google Pay:
Google Pay is now supported at checkout during onboarding, alongside Apple Pay.
Dec 15, 2025
Hello, Web
Platform
Copilot for Web is here! We’re thrilled to have a Web app, alongside the iOS, iPadOS, MacOS apps you know and love.
Your Privacy Choices
© Copyright 2026 Copilot Money, Inc.

analysis.name: Copilot Money
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-powered personal finance app that automatically tracks all accounts, spending, budgets, and investments in one beautifully designed native experience across Apple platforms and web.
analysis.ideal_customer: Individual consumers — especially Apple-ecosystem users — who want a polished, automated replacement for Mint with investment tracking and AI categorization

features.name: ai transaction categorization
features.description: ML engine learns spending patterns and auto-tags every transaction; improves over time
features.evidence_quote: Our AI learns your spending patterns and tags every transaction automatically. The more you use it, the smarter it gets.

features.name: spending tracking
features.description: Full transaction history with categorized spending across all linked accounts
features.evidence_quote: Track spending, budgets, investments, net worth, and get personalized recommendations.

features.name: budget management
features.description: Set per-category budgets and monitor spending against them
features.evidence_quote: Budget rebalancing — Tap to approve smart adjustment suggestions

features.name: budget rollovers
features.description: Unspent budget balance carries forward to the next month
features.evidence_quote: Didn't spend your full budget this month? Roll it over and save up for bigger purchases.

features.name: budget rebalancing
features.description: App suggests smart budget adjustments; user approves with a tap
features.evidence_quote: Budget rebalancing — Tap to approve smart adjustment suggestions

features.name: cash flow analysis
features.description: Monthly income vs. expense summaries with trend tracking
features.evidence_quote: Income up, expenses down. Track trends with monthly summaries.

features.name: net worth tracking
features.description: Consolidated view of all accounts and investments to show total net worth
features.evidence_quote: Net-worth tracking — Keep tabs on your net worth with consolidated views of your accounts and investments

features.name: account aggregation
features.description: Links bank, investment, crypto, and real estate accounts into one dashboard
features.evidence_quote: Stocks, crypto, your house. No need to jump between five different apps to see your net worth.

features.name: investment tracking
features.description: Tracks stocks, mutual funds, ETFs, bonds, crypto, and real estate in one view
features.evidence_quote: Stocks / Mutual Funds / ETFs / Bonds / Real Estate / Crypto — All your investments together in harmony

features.name: live portfolio performance
features.description: Real-time estimated performance for individual holdings and total portfolio
features.evidence_quote: Live estimates. Check when you want to, not when you have to.

features.name: portfolio allocation view
features.description: Visual breakdown of investment allocation by asset class (equity, crypto, ETF, cash, real estate)
features.evidence_quote: Too much crypto? Not enough bonds? See how diversified you are.

features.name: real estate valuation
features.description: Tracks estimated home value by linking a Zillow URL or address
features.evidence_quote: Type in your address. We'll track what your place is worth.

features.name: recurring expense detection
features.description: Automatically detects and organizes recurring transactions into a monthly view
features.evidence_quote: Copilot detects your recurring transactions and organizes them into a monthly view

features.name: subscription tracking
features.description: Surfaces forgotten or price-changed subscriptions
features.evidence_quote: That streaming service you forgot about? We didn't.

features.name: recurring price change alerts
features.description: Alerts when a recurring charge increases in price
features.evidence_quote: Catch price changes — Recurrings help you spot price hikes sooner

features.name: split recurring expenses
features.description: Reconcile regularly shared recurring expenses between people
features.evidence_quote: Split recurrings — Easily reconcile regularly shared expenses

features.name: pause recurrings
features.description: Temporarily pause a recurring subscription in tracking without deleting it
features.evidence_quote: Pause recurrings — Your subscription will be there when you're ready

features.name: recurring frequency tuning
features.description: Manually set or adjust the detected frequency of a recurring transaction
features.evidence_quote: Set a frequency — Tune recurrings to the frequency you want

features.name: daily spending snapshot
features.description: Morning-style summary of recent spending, pending refunds, and upcoming bills
features.evidence_quote: Start your day with a quick look at your spending line, pending refunds, and upcoming bills.

features.name: custom categories
features.description: User-defined spending categories and category groups
features.evidence_quote: Custom categories — Create your own spending categories and groups

features.name: categorization rules
features.description: User-defined rules to auto-categorize specific transactions
features.evidence_quote: Categorization rules — Define custom rules for the trickiest transactions

features.name: bulk transaction editing
features.description: Select and edit multiple transactions at once
features.evidence_quote: Bulk actions — Mac and iPad

features.name: full transaction control
features.description: Edit any field on any transaction (amount, category, tags, notes, etc.)
features.evidence_quote: Full transaction control — Make adjustments to any part of a transaction

features.name: amazon integration
features.description: See itemized Amazon order details within transactions (Copilot Labs)
features.evidence_quote: Integrations — See transaction details from Amazon and Venmo

features.name: venmo integration
features.description: See Venmo transaction details within spending history (Copilot Labs)
features.evidence_quote: Integrations — See transaction details from Amazon and Venmo

features.name: goals tracking
features.description: Set and monitor financial savings goals
features.evidence_quote: Goals — Learn more about Copilot Money's Goals tab

features.name: widgets
features.description: Home screen and desktop widgets for quick financial snapshots
features.evidence_quote: Widgets — Mac, iPhone, and iPad

features.name: quick launcher
features.description: Keyboard-accessible quick launcher for fast navigation on Mac and iPad
features.evidence_quote: Quick launcher — Mac and iPad

features.name: fast search
features.description: Full-text search across transactions and accounts
features.evidence_quote: Fast search — Mac, iPhone, and iPad

features.name: face id / biometric auth
features.description: Face ID authentication for secure app access on iPhone and iPad
features.evidence_quote: Face ID — iPhone and iPad

features.name: two-factor authentication
features.description: 2FA via authenticator app for logins and sensitive account actions
features.evidence_quote: You can now add an extra layer of security to your account and device access by enabling two-factor authentication.

features.name: global sign-out
features.description: Revoke all active sessions across devices in one click
features.evidence_quote: A new option in your Settings section allows you to log out of active sessions on all your devices with one click.

features.name: native apple apps
features.description: Built with Apple frameworks for Mac, iPhone, and iPad; not a web wrapper
features.evidence_quote: Native applications — Built with Apple frameworks for the best performance on Mac, iPhone, and iPad

features.name: web app
features.description: Browser-based version of Copilot, launched December 2025
features.evidence_quote: Copilot for Web is here! We're thrilled to have a Web app, alongside the iOS, iPadOS, MacOS apps you know and love.

features.name: dark mode
features.description: Light and dark mode support across all platforms
features.evidence_quote: Light and Dark mode — Mac, iPhone, and iPad

features.name: apple card support
features.description: Native support for Apple Card, Apple Cash, and Apple Savings accounts
features.evidence_quote: Apple Card, Apple Cash, Savings — iPhone

features.name: manual account management
features.description: Add and update manual accounts with instant balance and net worth refresh
features.evidence_quote: When you update a manual account balance or add transactions, your total assets and net worth will refresh right away

features.name: crypto exchange support
features.description: Link crypto exchanges directly from web app to include in net worth
features.evidence_quote: Crypto Exchange Support: You can now link supported crypto exchanges directly from the web app

features.name: mcp integration
features.description: Model Context Protocol server exposing financial data to AI tools (read-only beta)
features.evidence_quote: Now available in beta, it connects Copilot Money securely and directly to top AI tools…tested for Claude, ChatGPT, and Codex CLI.

features.name: ai money assistant
features.description: Proactive AI sidekick that monitors finances and surfaces insights; can make edits with approval (beta)
features.evidence_quote: Meet: your personal money assistant — a proactive sidekick that keeps an eye on your finances, connects the dots, and surfaces what matters

features.name: personalized recommendations
features.description: AI-driven suggestions for spending and savings improvements
features.evidence_quote: Track spending, budgets, investments, net worth, and get personalized recommendations.

features.name: shared expense tracking
features.description: Track and manage shared household or partner finances
features.evidence_quote: Sam + Bo are managing their family's finances / Mateo is tracking shared expenses

features.name: google pay checkout
features.description: Google Pay supported at checkout during onboarding alongside Apple Pay
features.evidence_quote: Google Pay is now supported at checkout during onboarding, alongside Apple Pay.

features.name: accessibility options
features.description: Dedicated accessibility settings for the app
features.evidence_quote: Accessibility — Learn more about accessibility options

features.name: free test drive
features.description: Explore the full app UI before connecting any financial accounts
features.evidence_quote: Take Copilot for a spin before you connect a single account.

differentiators: AI learns spending patterns and improves categorization over time without manual rules
Budget rollovers carry unspent balances forward month-to-month
Native Apple framework apps (not web wrappers) on Mac, iPhone, and iPad
MCP server exposes financial data directly to AI tools like Claude and ChatGPT
Proactive AI money assistant that monitors and surfaces insights without being asked
No ads, no data selling — subscription-only revenue model
Positioned explicitly as the best Mint replacement

recent_ships.what: MCP Beta — read-only Model Context Protocol server connecting Copilot to Claude, ChatGPT, and Codex CLI
recent_ships.source: We're building an MCP. Now available in beta, it connects Copilot Money securely and directly to top AI tools.

recent_ships.what: AI Money Assistant Beta — proactive AI sidekick that monitors finances and can make edits with user approval
recent_ships.source: Meet: your personal money assistant — a proactive sidekick that keeps an eye on your finances, connects the dots, and surfaces what matters

recent_ships.what: Web: crypto exchange linking, faster account loading, bulk edit stability fixes, side panel refresh
recent_ships.source: Crypto Exchange Support: You can now link supported crypto exchanges directly from the web app

recent_ships.what: Two-factor authentication via authenticator app, plus global session sign-out
recent_ships.source: You can now add an extra layer of security to your account and device access by enabling two-factor authentication.

recent_ships.what: Web speed & workflow improvements: manual account sync, connection management, Google Pay at checkout
recent_ships.source: Google Pay is now supported at checkout during onboarding, alongside Apple Pay.

recent_ships.what: Web app launch across all major browsers
recent_ships.source: Copilot for Web is here! We're thrilled to have a Web app, alongside the iOS, iPadOS, MacOS apps you know and love.

praised: Design and UX quality: 'I love how friendly the iPhone and Mac apps are to use, and how much effort has been spent to get the UX to feel native and clean.'
Superior Mint replacement: 'Been using @mint for close to a decade and switched to @copilotmoney last week and DAMN. This IS the move.'
Account aggregation dashboard: 'Finally got an app with a dashboard showing me all my accounts in one place.'
Ease of use: '@copilotmoney is awesome, clean design and easy to use'
Worth paying for: 'I never thought I would be spending money on a budgeting app but this one is worth it!'
Fast feature iteration: 'They're also really quick to roll out new features, which has been awesome to see the app getting constantly better.'
Responsive support: 'incredible support team that actually listen to their customers!'
Automation balance: 'the right things are automatic and effortless. You can choose how manual you'd like it to be'
Investment visibility over 2+ years of use: 'I'm able to see exactly where all my spend is going and plan for my future.'

tiers.name: Copilot Money
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full access to all features; $95 billed yearly. Monthly billing also available at unstated price.

pricing.notes: Single-tier subscription. Yearly plan is $95/year (~$7.92/mo). Monthly option exists but monthly price not shown in available source text. Free test-drive (demo mode) available before connecting accounts. No free tier. No ads or data monetization by design.
